Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Package com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal

Class BigDecimalValidatorImpl

java.lang.Object
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension.AbstractObjectValidator<S,T>
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension.AbstractComparableValidator<S,T>
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension.AbstractNumberValidator<BigDecimalValidator,BigDecimal>
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.BigDecimalValidatorImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
BigDecimalValidator, ExtensibleComparableValidator<BigDecimalValidator,BigDecimal>, ExtensibleNumberValidator<BigDecimalValidator,BigDecimal>, ExtensibleObjectValidator<BigDecimalValidator,BigDecimal>
public final class BigDecimalValidatorImpl extends AbstractNumberValidator<BigDecimalValidator,BigDecimal> implements BigDecimalValidator
Default implementation of BigDecimalValidator.

  • Constructor Details

    • BigDecimalValidatorImpl

      public BigDecimalValidatorImpl(ApplicationScope scope, Configuration config, String name, BigDecimal actual, List<ValidationFailure> failures, boolean fatalFailure)
      Parameters:
      scope - the application configuration
      config - the instance configuration
      name - the name of the value
      actual - the actual value
      failures - the list of validation failures
      fatalFailure - true if validation stopped as the result of a fatal failure
      Throws:
      AssertionError - if scope, config, name or failures are null. If name is blank.
